name: Morning Edition

abilities.name: Demise (Journalistic Spin)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, enemy models within (melee)2" gain an Entranced token.

abilities.name: Media Burnout
abilities.text: After this model resolves the Interact action, or an enemy model controlled by this model resolves the Interact action, increase this crew's scandal bar by 1.

abilities.name: On a Deadline
abilities.text: After an enemy model within 3" declares the Interact action, this model may decrease this crew's scandal bar by 2 to draw a card.

extraction_notes: Scandal bar visual shown with numbered circles 1-6
Card features illustration of female journalist character with chains
